raw_consumer_statement:
SUBJECT : Fraudulent Review Denies Reversal of Fraudulent Interest Charges PLEASE READ THE CITIBANK CASE FILES IN SEQUENCE ( Each file is numbered and titled for clarity. Volumes build upon each other and are best understood in order. ) This is Volume 16 of a 21-Volume, 167-page documented sequence detailing systemic Citi misconduct. 

In this volume, I detail how I asked Citibank to reverse interest charges that violated the 21-month 0 % APR balance transfer promotion I relied on. Instead of honoring the promo, Citi denied my request, claiming their review of my account determined all interest charges to be accurate, yet later refunded {$320.00} an admission by action that their original denial was false from the start.
